trackerDomains.note: Facebook Pixel / social embeds — cross-site tracking.

collectors.usage: An ad-tech company designed to track products you view across sites and retarget you with ads.
A demand-side ad platform designed to build a cross-site/cross-device identity for ad bidding.
An identity-resolution company designed to connect online activity to offline / real-world identity.
A programmatic ad exchange designed to sync identifiers and trade ad impressions in real time.
An ad exchange designed to match audience identifiers across sites for real-time ad bidding.
A data-management platform designed to segment audiences across sites.
Designed to personalize and measure ads across the web using a cross-site advertising ID.
Designed to measure site traffic and your on-site behavior for the website owner.
Designed to match your browsing to your Facebook/Instagram account for ad targeting & measurement.
Designed to retarget you with ads based on shopping and browsing signals.
Designed to target and measure advertising, typically using a cross-site identifier.

rollup.label: Linkage to your real identity / email

dataCollection.trackedSince: This Google Analytics ID was first set on Jun 22, 2026 — it resets whenever you clear cookies.

risk.verdict: Very heavy tracking. Your visit is shared widely for ads & profiling.

factors.label: Third-party trackers contacted
factors.detail: 19 known tracking domains loaded resources on this page.

factors.label: Advertising & data-broker cookies
factors.detail: 60 cookies used to target ads or sell audience data.

factors.label: Device fingerprinting observed
factors.detail: 2 fingerprinting techniques (audio, canvas) actually ran on this page — these can recognise your device without cookies.

factors.label: Number of companies receiving data
factors.detail: 22 separate companies can associate this visit with you.

factors.label: Long-lived tracking cookies
factors.detail: 25 tracking cookies persist for more than 6 months.

factors.label: Cookies missing the Secure flag
factors.detail: 26 cookies could be sent over an unencrypted connection.

factors.label: Unrecognized third-party connections
factors.detail: 21 other third-party domains were contacted but aren't in our known list — unverified, worth a look.

factors.label: Analytics cookies
factors.detail: 2 cookies measuring your behavior on the site.
